verdict: Lead engine is working. Cost per lead beats benchmarks. Fix intake speed and Instagram presence to capture more value.
diagnosis: Facebook campaign produced 142 leads at roughly $24 each this period — well below the $649 legal average and the $27 Facebook lead benchmark.

signals.headline: 142 leads at $24 each
signals.detail: Facebook campaign delivered 142 leads on $3,471 spend this period. Cost per lead sits well under legal industry norms.

signals.headline: 844 landing page views, 1,055 clicks
signals.detail: Roughly 80% of clicks reach the landing page. Drop-off from page view to lead form is the bottleneck worth fixing.

signals.headline: 115 calls from Google profile
signals.detail: Google Business Profile drove 115 call clicks this period. Local presence is a meaningful second channel beyond paid social.

signals.headline: 61 reviews at 5.0 stars
signals.detail: Review base hit 61 with a perfect average and a fresh five-star testimonial this period. Strong trust signal for new prospects.

signals.headline: Only 27 Instagram followers
signals.detail: Organic Instagram is essentially dormant despite paid activity on the account. Audience is not compounding between campaigns.
